req.title: Create encounter (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall create an Encounter for a patient with start and end timestamps; end before start shall be rejected. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement mandates: (1) a valid encounter with start < end is accepted (EP positive partition), (2) end < start is rejected with 422 (NEG / DT error row), (3) end == start is a boundary condition that must be explicitly probed (BVA on the timestamp comparison operator). Additional boundary cases cover the numeric/timestamp extremes implied by 'boundary cases on numeric elements'. Four tests cover EP-positive, NEG, BVA-equal, and BVA-one-second-apart, giving full coverage of the stated error pathway and boundary contract.

tests.name: test_create_encounter_valid_start_before_end
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture
A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Build payload with resourceType Encounter, subject referencing existing patient, period.start = '2024-06-01T08:00:00Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T09:00:00Z'
POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header
expected: Stored period.start and period.end match submitted values
trace: R-HLT-031 – happy path; start < end by 60 minutes; encounter shall be stored

tests.name: test_create_encounter_end_before_start_rejected
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture
A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Build payload with period.start = '2024-06-01T10:00:00Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T09:00:00Z' (end 1 hour BEFORE start)
POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header
expected: Response body contains an error or OperationOutcome indicating invalid period
trace: R-HLT-031 – explicit error pathway: 422 when end < start

tests.name: test_create_encounter_end_equals_start_boundary
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture
A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
System specification clarified: end == start is either accepted (zero-duration) or rejected; test asserts whichever is documented
actions: Build payload with period.start = period.end = '2024-06-01T08:00:00Z' (identical timestamps)
POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header
expected: HTTP status is either 201 (zero-duration encounter accepted) or 422 (zero-duration rejected)
If 201: response body contains 'id' and matching period values
If 422: response body contains error information
trace: R-HLT-031 – BVA on-point: end == start; probes the strict-vs-inclusive boundary of the rejection predicate

tests.name: test_create_encounter_end_one_second_after_start_boundary
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture
A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Build payload with period.start = '2024-06-01T08:00:00Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T08:00:01Z' (end exactly 1 second after start)
POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header
expected: Stored period reflects the 1-second duration correctly
trace: R-HLT-031 – BVA off-point: minimum valid positive duration (start + 1 s); must be accepted

tests.name: test_create_encounter_end_one_second_before_start_rejected
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture
A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Build payload with period.start = '2024-06-01T08:00:01Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T08:00:00Z' (end exactly 1 second before start)
POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header
expected: Response body signals a period validation error
trace: R-HLT-031 – DT row: end < start by minimal delta (1 s); must be rejected with 422

```json
{
  "requirement_id": "R-HLT-031",
  "reasoning": "The requirement mandates: (1) a valid encounter with start < end is accepted (EP positive partition), (2) end < start is rejected with 422 (NEG / DT error row), (3) end == start is a boundary condition that must be explicitly probed (BVA on the timestamp comparison operator). Additional boundary cases cover the numeric/timestamp extremes implied by 'boundary cases on numeric elements'. Four tests cover EP-positive, NEG, BVA-equal, and BVA-one-second-apart, giving full coverage of the stated error pathway and boundary contract.",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "test_create_encounter_valid_start_before_end",
      "kind": "positive",
      "heuristic": "EP",
      "preconditions": [
        "Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture",
        "A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture",
        "fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL"
      ],
      "actions": [
        "Build payload with resourceType Encounter, subject referencing existing patient, period.start = '2024-06-01T08:00:00Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T09:00:00Z'",
        "POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header",
        "Capture HTTP response"
      ],
      "expected": [
        "HTTP status 201",
        "Response body contains 'resourceType': 'Encounter'",
        "Response body contains an 'id' field",
        "Stored period.start and period.end match submitted values"
      ],
      "trace": [
        "R-HLT-031 – happy path; start < end by 60 minutes; encounter shall be stored"
      ],
      "executable": "import pytest\nimport requests\n\ndef test_create_encounter_valid_start_before_end(base_url, clinician_auth_token, existing_patient_id):\n    payload = {\n        \"resourceType\": \"Encounter\",\n        \"status\": \"finished\",\n        \"subject\": {\"reference\": f\"Patient/{existing_patient_id}\"},\n        \"period\": {\n            \"start\": \"2024-06-01T08:00:00Z\",\n            \"end\":   \"2024-06-01T09:00:00Z\"\n        }\n    }\n    headers = {\"Authorization\": f\"Bearer {clinician_auth_token}\", \"Content-Type\": \"application/fhir+json\"}\n    resp = requests.post(f\"{base_url}/Encounter\", json=payload, headers=headers)\n    assert resp.status_code == 201, f\"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}\"\n    body = resp.json()\n    assert body.get(\"resourceType\") == \"Encounter\"\n    assert \"id\" in body\n    assert body[\"period\"][\"start\"] == \"2024-06-01T08:00:00Z\"\n    assert body[\"period\"][\"end\"]   == \"2024-06-01T09:00:00Z\"\n"
    },
    {
      "name": "test_create_encounter_end_before_start_rejected",
      "kind": "negative",
      "heuristic": "NEG",
      "preconditions": [
        "Authenticated clinician token available via <clinician_auth_token> fixture",
        "A patient exists; patient ID available via <existing_patient_id> fixture",
        "fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL"
      ],
      "actions": [
        "Build payload with period.start = '2024-06-01T10:00:00Z', period.end = '2024-06-01T09:00:00Z' (end 1 hour BEFORE start)",
        "POST payload to /Encounter with clinician Authorization header",
        "Capture HTTP response"
      ],
      "expected": [
        "HTTP status 422",
        "Response body contains an error or OperationOutcome indicating invalid period"
      ],
      "trace": [
        "R-HLT-031 – explicit error pathway: 422 when end < start"
      ],
      "executable": "import pytest\nimport requests\n\ndef test_create_encounter_end_before_start_rejected(base_url, clinician_auth_token, existing_patient_id):\n    payload = {\n        \"resourceType\": \"Encounter\",\n        \"status\": \"finished\",\n        \"subject\": {\"reference\": f\"Patient/{existing_patient_id}\"},\n        \"period\": {\n            \"start\": \"2024-06-01T10:00:00Z\",\n            \"end\":   \"2024-06-01T09:00:00Z\"\n        }\n    }\n
